SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_BOOKOF_DONGHW: Link Relic. You can gain Emotion. Right-click to increase Emotion Level and extract an Abnormality, up to Level 5.

Hana Association seems to have taken an interest in the Library and the Blue Reverberation—the two entities at the center of all the problems that have been happening in L Corp’s Nest lately—now that they’ve marked their presence in the City’s sky as Stars. I asked a Color who happens to be a friend of mine about it… and he said the Association’s going to recruit him to hunt down the Blue Reverberation and his cohorts soon.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_BOOKOF_PIERRE: Link Relic. You can gain Emotion. Right-click to increase Emotion Level and extract an Abnormality, up to Level 3.

I wouldn’t be trying so hard if there was an end to delicacy! All the chefs are continuing their research to this day, seeking more stimulating flavors. And I just want to be as good as the stain on their apron at least!
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_BOOKOF_SAYO.d: Link Relic. You can gain Emotion. Right-click to increase Emotion Level and extract an Abnormality, up to Level 4.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_BOOKOF_SAYO.f: when the Finger Bow-Bell nears, all members of the five Fingers will try to avoid conflict and refrain from causing big problems. It’s thanks to the leaders of each Syndicate who caution their subordinates that fights between smaller Syndicates could grow into a massive conflict between the big ones, perhaps… If subsidiary Syndicates ran into trouble, the seniors at the Finger Bow-Bell would be faced with quite the embarrassment, now wouldn’t they?
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_DIAMOND_PICKA:
Unlocks crafting options at Rest Sites. At the end of combat, gain 8 materials.
Current materials: {Materials}.
Upgrades after {UpgradeProgress} battles.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_DIARY.descrip:
At the start of combat, carve [blue]{ChronoMark}[/blue] [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold].
Upon entering the first combat, link three random spacetimes.
When entering the next Act, upgrade the linked spacetimes.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_DIARY.flavor: A diary recording some interesting spacetimes.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_DIARY.title: Diary
Unlocks crafting options at Rest Sites. At the end of combat, gain 4 materials.
Current materials: {Materials}.
Upgrades after {UpgradeProgress} battles.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_NETHERITE_PIC:
Unlocks crafting options at Rest Sites. At the end of combat, gain 12 materials.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_OPEN_DIARY.de:
At the start of combat, carve [blue]{ChronoMark}[/blue] [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold].
At the start of each turn, carve [blue]{ChronoMarkPerTurn}[/blue] [gold]Chrono Marks[/gold].
When entering the next Act, upgrade the linked spacetimes.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_OPEN_DIARY.fl: The opened diary always points in a certain direction.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_STONE_PICKAXE:

Current materials: {Materials}.

SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_TOTEM_UNDYING: Once per game, after taking fatal damage, prevent that damage and recover 50% of Max HP, gain 5 Regeneration and 10 Plated Armor.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_RELIC_STW_WOODEN_PICKAX:
Unlocks crafting options at Rest Sites. At the end of combat, gain 2 materials.
Current materials: {Materials}.
Upgrades after {UpgradeProgress} battles.
STW_DIARY_D:
Living Fog: Prevents Smoggy from spreading.
Infested Prism: Tainted received is reduced to 1/2.
